methods.short abs(short h): Returns the absolute value of the specified half-precision float.
methods.byte byteValue(): Returns the value of this Half as a byte after a narrowing primitive conversion.
methods.short ceil(short h): Returns the smallest half-precision float value toward negative infinity greater than or equal to the specified half-precision float value.
methods.int compare(short x, short y): Compares the two specified half-precision float values.
methods.int compareTo(Half h): Compares the two specified half-precision float values.
methods.short copySign(short magnitude, short si: Returns the first parameter with the sign of the second parameter.
methods.double doubleValue(): Returns the value of this Half as a double after a widening primitive conversion.
methods.boolean equals(short x, short y): Returns true if the two half-precision float values are equal.
methods.boolean equals(Object o): Compares this object against the specified object.
methods.float floatValue(): Returns the value of this Half as a float after a widening primitive conversion.
methods.short floor(short h): Returns the largest half-precision float value toward positive infinity less than or equal to the specified half-precision float value.
methods.int getExponent(short h): Returns the unbiased exponent used in the representation of the specified half-precision float value.
methods.int getSign(short h): Returns the sign of the specified half-precision float.
methods.int getSignificand(short h): Returns the significand, or mantissa, used in the representation of the specified half-precision float value.
methods.boolean greater(short x, short y): Returns true if the first half-precision float value is greater (larger toward positive infinity) than the second half-precision float value.
methods.boolean greaterEquals(short x, short y): Returns true if the first half-precision float value is greater (larger toward positive infinity) than or equal to the second half-precision float value.
methods.int halfToIntBits(short h): Returns a representation of the specified half-precision float value according to the bit layout described in Half.
methods.int halfToRawIntBits(short h): Returns a representation of the specified half-precision float value according to the bit layout described in Half.
methods.short halfToShortBits(short h): Returns a representation of the specified half-precision float value according to the bit layout described in Half.
methods.short halfValue(): Returns the half-precision value of this Half as a short containing the bit representation described in Half.
methods.int hashCode(short h): Returns a hash code for a half-precision float value.
methods.int hashCode(): Returns a hash code for this Half object.
methods.short intBitsToHalf(int bits): Returns the half-precision float value corresponding to a given bit representation.
methods.int intValue(): Returns the value of this Half as a int after a narrowing primitive conversion.
methods.boolean isInfinite(short h): Returns true if the specified half-precision float value represents infinity, false otherwise.
methods.boolean isNaN(): Returns true if this Half value represents a Not-a-Number, false otherwise.
methods.boolean isNaN(short h): Returns true if the specified half-precision float value represents a Not-a-Number, false otherwise.
methods.boolean isNormalized(short h): Returns true if the specified half-precision float value is normalized (does not have a subnormal representation).
methods.boolean less(short x, short y): Returns true if the first half-precision float value is less (smaller toward negative infinity) than the second half-precision float value.
methods.boolean lessEquals(short x, short y): Returns true if the first half-precision float value is less (smaller toward negative infinity) than or equal to the second half-precision float value.
methods.long longValue(): Returns the value of this Half as a long after a narrowing primitive conversion.
methods.short max(short x, short y): Returns the larger of two half-precision float values (the value closest to positive infinity).
methods.short min(short x, short y): Returns the smaller of two half-precision float values (the value closest to negative infinity).
methods.short parseHalf(String s): Returns the half-precision float value represented by the specified string.
methods.short round(short h): Returns the closest integral half-precision float value to the specified half-precision float value.
methods.short shortValue(): Returns the value of this Half as a short after a narrowing primitive conversion.
methods.float toFloat(short h): Converts the specified half-precision float value into a single-precision float value.
methods.short toHalf(float f): Converts the specified single-precision float value into a half-precision float value.
methods.String toHexString(short h): Returns a hexadecimal string representation of the specified half-precision float value.
methods.String toString(short h): Returns a string representation of the specified half-precision float value.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the specified half-precision float value.
methods.short trunc(short h): Returns the truncated half-precision float value of the specified half-precision float value.
methods.Half valueOf(String s): Returns a Half instance representing the specified string value.
methods.Half valueOf(float f): Returns a Half instance representing the specified float value.
methods.Half valueOf(short h): Returns a Half instance representing the specified half-precision float value.
